message:
fix(security): batch-92 audit fixes — 2 HIGH, 5 MEDIUM across 6 files

Session (2 HIGH, 1 MEDIUM):
- Use getrandom CSPRNG for session ID generation instead of RandomState+timestamp
- Prevent session fixation by regenerating ID when store.load() returns None
- Expire cookie (Max-Age=0) on session.clear() instead of re-setting same ID

PostgreSQL (3 MEDIUM):
- Truncate at embedded NUL in write_cstring to prevent protocol injection
- Guard build_message/build_startup_message against i32 overflow on huge payloads
- Use wrapping_add for next_stmt_id to prevent panic on u32 overflow

Database pool (1 MEDIUM):
- Preserve original created_at through PooledConnection checkout/return cycle
  so max_lifetime eviction works for actively-used connections

Transaction (1 MEDIUM):
- Validate savepoint names against [a-zA-Z0-9_]+ to prevent SQL injection

HTTP client (1 MEDIUM):
- Reject status codes outside 100-999 per RFC 9110 §15

Middleware (1 MEDIUM):
- Use append_vary_header instead of insert in CORS to avoid clobbering
  inner handler's Vary tokens (e.g. accept-encoding from compression)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
